Jason S. Takenouchi, Esq. and Veronica Nauts, Esq. of KASOWITZ BENSON TORRES LLP, T:415.421.6140, for defendants/moving party;
Timothy Flaherty, Esq. of CLARK HILL, T:415.984.8507, for plaintiff/opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court takes DEFENDANTS NIRAJ MEHTA, FIFTH SET VENTURES, LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS under submission.
